home.heroTag: Write your year into a book.
home.showcaseLine: Not a year-end review — a book about you.
home.sSub:
The year is ending
Some things worth keeping
home.sSumA1: Went to Dali, stayed by the lake...
home.sSumA3: March to May, doubting my path...
home.yoyQ:
What was the happiest thing
this year?
home.yoy2024: Moved into a new place. Finally got a desk of my own.
home.yoy2025: Caught an unexpected sunset in Dali.
home.yoy2026: Learned to say no — and the world didn’t fall apart.
home.endingTitle:
What would you like
to say this year?
